model_support.neuroplc: MLP + KAN (B-spline LUT, SiLU, Softmax, Argmax)
model_support.rtnnigen: MLP only (Dense + standard activations: ReLU, tanh, sigmoid, SiLU, etc.)
model_support.detail: KAN requires B-spline LUT compilation, which RTNNIgen cannot express. This is NeuroPLC's core contribution.

correctness_guarantees.neuroplc: Theorem 1 (2-layer error bound) + Doubleton Arithmetic (3.1× tighter than IA). Provable design-time bounds.
correctness_guarantees.rtnnigen: None. No formal or empirical correctness analysis reported.
correctness_guarantees.detail: RTNNIgen reports empirical precision validation only.

plc_platform.neuroplc: Siemens S7-1200 (SCL) + S7-1500 (SCL). Single codebase → multiple targets.
plc_platform.detail: Siemens holds ~30% global PLC market share vs Beckhoff ~5%.

code_structure.neuroplc: DB (parameters) + FB (inference) integrated SCL. Human-readable parameter arrays. Single import.
code_structure.rtnnigen: FB (inference) + external binary weights file. Weights opaque; requires runtime file I/O.
code_structure.detail: DB+FB allows TIA Portal compile-time verification of all parameters.

activation_support.neuroplc: B-spline LUT (piecewise polynomial) + SiLU + Softmax + Argmax. Adaptive LUT allocation (DP-optimal + curvature-aware).
activation_support.rtnnigen: Standard: linear, ReLU, tanh, sigmoid, softplus, softsign, SiLU, selu, exponential. No learned/non-parametric activations.
activation_support.detail: B-spline LUT enables KAN deployment, which is NeuroPLC's key enabler.

parameter_handling.neuroplc: Human-readable ARRAY OF REAL in DB. Auditable, diffable, version-controllable.
parameter_handling.rtnnigen: Packed binary blob with SHA-256 hash. Not human-readable; requires tool to inspect.
parameter_handling.detail: Human readability is critical for safety-certified industrial systems.

verification_tooling.neuroplc: 166 compiler tests. TIA Portal V21 compile verification (0 errors, 0 warnings). Instruction-level cycle analysis.
verification_tooling.rtnnigen: No test suite in public repository. No PLC compile verification reported.
verification_tooling.detail: Compiler testing is essential for industrial trust.
